subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is no God but Him, and He Who hath come from the heaven of proof is verily the Hidden Mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من سماء البرهان انه هو السر المکنون و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
